overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Odyssey depicting exploration of the Temple of Athena Poliouchos at night. The player character walks through colonnades, approaches the temple entrance flanked by caryatid statues, enters to explore the torchlit interior with a stationary guard, and exits to an outdoor courtyard with a sacrificial altar overlooking the mountains.

events.description: exits the covered colonnade into the open exterior pathway

agents.ego_description: walking through the temple colonnade toward the exterior gardens

entered.detail: large bronze brazier with burning logs emitting warm light
tall fluted columns supporting the roof of the colonnade
large rectangular stone paving tiles covering the walkway
open-air stone pathway lined with vegetation leading away from the colonnade

segments.scene_description: The segment begins inside a covered colonnade illuminated by a circular fire pit. The player walks forward between tall stone columns along paved tiles, transitioning from the sheltered interior to an open exterior path lined with cypress trees and shrubs under the night sky.

events.description: begins ascending the wide stone staircase leading to the temple entrance
reaches the top of the stairs approaching the caryatid-flanked temple entrance

agents.ego_description: walking along the exterior pathway and climbing the temple stairs toward the entrance

entered.detail: wide stone staircase with multiple steps leading up to the temple entrance
large stone female figure serving as architectural support on the left side of the entrance
large stone female figure serving as architectural support on the right side of the entrance
monumental doorway with decorative stone lintel and bronze doors

segments.scene_description: The player moves along an exterior stone pathway surrounded by trees and bushes, approaching the temple. The segment features ascending a grand staircase toward the imposing entrance flanked by massive caryatid statues, with the night sky fully visible above.

events.description: enters the torchlit temple interior from the exterior entrance
encounters a stationary guard holding a torch inside the entrance

agents.ego_description: entering the temple and exploring the interior chamber, examining storage items and decorations

notable_agents.action: temple guard standing at the entrance holding a torch, wearing a helmet and carrying a round shield

entered.detail: large bronze double doors marking the threshold of the temple
enclosed room with patterned marble floors and decorated walls
bronze torch holders mounted on the walls providing warm illumination
wooden shelving units stacked with cloth and supplies
large wicker baskets filled with olives or similar goods
wooden table with various ritual objects and containers
blue hanging cloth with gold patterns on the back wall

segments.scene_description: The player enters the torchlit temple interior, passing a stationary guard at the threshold. Inside, the sanctuary features patterned marble floors, wall sconces, wooden storage shelves with woven baskets, and a central table. The camera pans to reveal a decorative blue tapestry and painted friezes near the ceiling.

events.description: exits the temple interior to the open-air courtyard
approaches the stone altar with ritual offerings

agents.ego_description: exiting the temple and exploring the exterior courtyard, approaching the sacrificial altar and overlooking the landscape

notable_agents.action: guard standing at the temple entrance holding a torch, facing outward

entered.detail: open stone-paved area outside the temple with braziers and ritual fixtures
rectangular stone sacrificial table with cloth covering and ritual items
large metal fire bowls burning on either side of the courtyard
ceramic bowls containing fruits and other offerings on the altar
scenic view of rocky hills and distant mountains under the night sky

segments.scene_description: The player exits the temple into an open courtyard illuminated by bronze braziers. A guard stands at the entrance as the player approaches a stone altar adorned with fruit offerings and ceremonial items. The segment concludes with a panoramic view of the mountainous landscape under the starry night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from the sheltered colonnades of a temple complex into its torchlit sanctuary and finally out to a panoramic mountain vista under a starry night. It begins within a covered walkway illuminated by a circular fire pit, moving past tall stone columns and paved tiles before transitioning onto an open exterior path lined with cypress trees. As the camera advances, the scene shifts toward the temple's imposing entrance, ascending a grand staircase flanked by massive caryatid statues. The movement then carries the viewer inside the torchlit interior, passing a stationary guard to reveal patterned marble floors, woven baskets on wooden shelves, and decorative blue tapestries. Finally, the camera exits the sanctuary into an open courtyard lit by bronze braziers, passing a stone altar adorned with fruit offerings before opening up to a wide view of the distant mountainous landscape.
